name: Jimmy Blacklock
position: Chief Justice, Supreme Court of Texas
termEnd: Current court term pending election-record review

contactInfo.office: Supreme Court Building, 201 W. 14th Street, Room 104, Austin, Texas 78701

bio: Jimmy Blacklock serves as Chief Justice of the Supreme Court of Texas. The Texas Judicial Branch says he was appointed to the Court in January 2018, re-elected in 2024, and appointed Chief Justice in January 2025.

sourceLinks.title: Official Texas Judicial Branch justice profile
